nasb.text: These are the commandments and the ordinances which the Lord commanded to the sons of Israel through Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan opposite Jericho.

esv.text: These are the commandments and the rules that the Lord commanded through Moses to the people of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

cnv.text: 這是耶和華在耶利哥對面，約旦河邊的摩押平原，藉著摩西向以色列人吩咐的命令和典章。

ccb.text: 以上是在耶利哥对面、约旦河边的摩押平原，耶和华借摩西颁布给以色列人的命令和律例。
